entries.gt_c5192f30a2474c: The price rises from shortage, from heat, and from how loudly you pay.
entries.gt_c8faba40f50d2b: You can surrender the sample to me, to NII, or to the Ministry. I pay faster; they file longer.
entries.gt_ba11950206101d: Overdue debt does not kill at once. It moves security closer to your door.
entries.gt_cfd3e0c0502113: Do not ask for a discount by the lamp. The lamp is a witness afterward.
entries.gt_e4cc1c585eb1e6: Your receipt stub is lying quiet. Keep it that way: dry, flat, no heroics.
entries.gt_cabea2cefc8c81: They hide the courier not because he is important. Because he has not started talking yet.
entries.gt_df5eb75693ebcd: Do not sell a Ministry form by the lamp. In the light you can see where the stamp is fake.
entries.gt_d91118b3477f25: Take the 9mm before the siren. During the siren, only the door is negotiable.
entries.gt_bd677186d24ee7: Floor 69 sends parts when it gets scared. I take parts, if they do not squeal.
entries.gt_af688c948c3758: The cash desk does not buy back what it was too scared to sell.
entries.gt_fe432eb52c6fd7: The entry cash desk stands right by the door: take an honest coupon or go through the hatch with debt.
entries.gt_ace4e1a19a0601: Another person's problem is fresh today. Tomorrow it gets cheaper, if it survives.
entries.gt_c6898f0962bcba: I did not see the raid. I saw the counters go empty one minute before it.
entries.gt_e7da4eb1a18828: The hatch leads down if the guide is sober. If not, still down.
entries.gt_b57e7bebb0c169: People go to Floor 69 for parts, and back for the price. I know a short way, but it takes a filter.
entries.gt_d578ff89f14fb1: If you are carrying a sample to NII, do not put it next to bread. The bread gets too scientific afterward.
entries.gt_a72cf73fb57b14: The hatch is wet, but alive. For now.
entries.gt_df39b013ef2f6b: Zlata Silence: "Need a ZHEK stamp. You cannot buy one: the seller gets turned in with you, and the stamp burns before the first window."
entries.gt_a7ed8931729ef8: Goods are out. Debt does not create new goods.
entries.gt_d29632d4945ca9: The weapons row removed the crates: the raid has already become a rumor.
entries.gt_f9dec2653c1410: Last One at the Cash Desk 88
entries.gt_e920c4c37b1b78: A green lamp blinks above the display board, and three yellow stains on the floor lead to the tunnel.
entries.gt_f04eab8f01f412: The display board clicks in time with the relay; the arrow lights only with a live fuse.
entries.gt_c4994952798b03: The red display board shows a car number without a station; the safe bypass is chalked by the underpass.
entries.gt_b7d15f89e9ce48: Platform loop: return to the light
entries.gt_5b347812d24def: White lamps along the wall lead back to the hall even after a wrong announcement.
entries.gt_12dedde79f886e: The white light ends before the blind tunnel: farther on you can hear steps, but the flashlight catches only wet concrete.
entries.gt_ab2cb1bf111fd1: Red Display Board of Wrong Boarding
entries.gt_81a7ab2c7da3bb: The red number on the display board leads to a short passage, but it may announce someone else's stop.
entries.gt_f51cb7913245fb: The train here does not run on schedule. It comes when the relay clicks the wrong way.
entries.gt_780029644f5537: If the display board speaks evenly, check the lamp. Even announcements here are usually not ours.
entries.gt_ed3ae7e06fb118: Do not board where the red number appeared before the station. The return loop is marked with white light.
entries.gt_d09d88cb54d8c5: Doors closing - hands away, thoughts too. Decide later whether to ride or wait.
entries.gt_bcc77e2761f3a5: If the station repeated, stay seated. The second time it usually checks the brave.
entries.gt_552976f19f2192: The switch answers the handle again. That does not mean you can trust it without a ticket.
entries.gt_f153669a53a716: The platform got brighter. Now you can see who is standing at the edge without a ticket.
entries.gt_bb18609b59c5af: A lamp is cheaper than treatment after the dark tunnel.
entries.gt_97eddd8bdf9ac4: The platform can be lit. Or not. In the dark, ours and theirs both see less.
entries.gt_c30de6cc79f70e: A flashlight does not make the route safe. It only shows where to pay.
entries.gt_0b8455b45e8df5: If the empty train is breathing, hide behind the kiosk. Let it unload those it is already carrying.
entries.gt_475769aef2c839: The white lamp by the depot does not save you. It just lets you see the wall back.
entries.gt_fccebbf1a75041: Is it lit? Then nobody has stolen the lamp yet.
entries.gt_a2129ddbc0bff4: Now the hands by the kiosk are visible. That is already enough for trade.
entries.gt_7c056dc4b1ef23: I am not lost. I occupied the wrong station ahead of orders.
entries.gt_d03248e244cc66: I will reach the light. The dispatcher's voice, I am less sure.
entries.gt_9a6846de82cc98: If they announce my surname, do not answer. That is not evacuation.
entries.gt_726d42d7fc1bb1: Red Lower is warm, like a cab after someone else's run. You step away to the wall from that.
entries.gt_e57824065a7731: The guide was right: listen to the first click, and do not stand by the edge on the second.
entries.gt_7d725e7e0c3ab2: I see light. So the living are still beating the schedule.
entries.gt_f2b2011e47ca2b: Take a filter. Down below, the air also likes checking documents.
entries.gt_84d3f4b9054ea3: Barsukov made it? Good. Let him sit by the white lamp and not argue with announcements.
entries.gt_933f02102c89bb: If the train asks your name, keep silent.
entries.gt_af9be1a6e84cb1: I already said this. So it is not too late yet.
entries.gt_75e01de27f0607: Hide the toothy ticket from the light.
entries.gt_e3cba99ecdcfb6: When the station repeats, the floor is colder than the door. Sit on the floor.
entries.gt_d32e01395c9c28: Nora: "Bring a metro ticket and choose the display board with the hint. Wrong boarding should cost a token, not a life."
entries.gt_0a242d21211e5b: Nora: "Two fuses into the signal box, and the switch will at least start lying consistently."
entries.gt_8b605658fea146: Gena: "Three intact lamps, and people will see the platform edge. If you do not bring them, people will be counted by scream again."
entries.gt_e7a1a67b41650c: Barsukov: "Lead me to Nora {dir}. If the white lamps end, we go back, no heroics."
entries.gt_41bb9606bd1ecb: lamps end before the blind tunnel
entries.gt_ad2af6d69b1a89: The white lamps go wrong: ahead is a blind tunnel, and someone else's breathing is audible in the corner.
entries.gt_5972f3adb868e6: The ambush was read before the shot. You can go slowly, light the way, or return by the loop.
entries.gt_793a2e84a294c6: The white lamps are behind you. The blind tunnel will meet you without warning.
entries.gt_0b574204b9648e: a fuse keeps the short path to C-15
entries.gt_0364b004d79c10: The display board clicks a service route: a fuse buys the short passage to C-15.
entries.gt_2d8ae6554e89e6: Service exit found. You can spend the fuse on the path or save it for repairs.
entries.gt_276e03b4473f77: The switch corridor went dark. The service shortcut remained on the display board.
entries.gt_d8d9c13a798e13: The sky over the roof repeats with an error every forty-seven seconds. It is not weather, it is a schedule.
entries.gt_82c869360ed93a: The Ministry asks us to write "clear." Citizens ask us to write the truth. Clouds ask for nothing.
entries.gt_263507f1d4e4f0: If you need an honest samosbor forecast, repair the mast or steal my form.
entries.gt_1e20a6651acdfb: The report is gone. Now the sky will lie under signature.
entries.gt_1ed90e38d419ed: When the clouds become square, run to ventilation, not the lift.
entries.gt_488c7a5110ec39: The antenna is held by wire, prayer, and other people's mistakes. The wire ran out first.
entries.gt_221c877adc1c69: Give me a coil and a cell, and I will raise the signal. Give me a bandage, and I will raise myself.
entries.gt_dcc95f683c62ad: No heroics on open concrete. Two dashes, cover, then the mast.
entries.gt_dbc2d85ed8beb3: The mast is alive. Now the upper floors will hear us before they eat us.
entries.gt_d8e27f6870ea74: If the relay clicks three times in a row again, the forecast came from somewhere else.
entries.gt_851e69941fbcff: The open roof belongs to whoever saw movement first.
entries.gt_8c291f5b222415: Two packs of cigarettes, and for ten minutes I watch the clouds instead of the passage.
entries.gt_1ad2a6088f88fb: You can shoot. You can black out the nest. You can crawl through ventilation. Every option makes a different noise.
entries.gt_810c4468cf3d20: The line is removed. Go while I have not changed my mind about watching the sky.
entries.gt_db69e82eb1c7ff: If anyone asks, the passage was empty. That is simpler for everyone alive.
entries.gt_61a9eb60382e8d: I saw one cloud pass twice. The second time it knew where I was standing.
entries.gt_8862ce16719b4d: A printout can be taken at the weather booth when the sky twitches. Yakov will understand that.
entries.gt_6aae464a04c2e9: Do not call this a street. A street has an end, and here there is only repeat.
entries.gt_51c10f782ff956: You have the frame. Now Yakov will have paper, not my word-of-honor story.
entries.gt_1613f239ca2918: If Yakov asks, I was not sleeping. Sleeping people do not count repeats.
entries.gt_0024b12e0f33fb: Tell Yakov: the sky is not above us. It is in front of us, like a screen.
entries.gt_ade910d390bdc4: Senya High-Climber: "Bring two coils of wire. A cell would be better, but without wire the mast does not hold contact even in quiet weather."
entries.gt_71d796d692e1ef: Varvara Meteorologist: "I need a blank form. I will write a report for the Ministry or the truth for the residents - decide who is more dangerous to believe."
entries.gt_c9d6271b457f56: Kadyr Line: "Two packs of cigarettes, and the open strip becomes a corridor. No cigarettes: black out the nest, strike first, or go through ventilation."
entries.gt_18041cd3b0db57: Tikhon Repeat: "Bring a cloud-frame printout from the weather booth. Yakov needs not a forecast, but proof of repetition."
entries.gt_5f4c559da6f7a9: The roof gave a clean frequency: rumors about weather and the upper floors became more reliable.
entries.gt_c8cf395eab8bd4: The weather report went to the Ministry: the sky stayed the same, the paper became more dangerous.
entries.gt_16165c75916331: Residents learned that the forecast was an order, not weather.
entries.gt_87eb6449a065a0: The open passage under the masts became shorter: Kadyr's nest no longer holds the whole slab.
entries.gt_6ef26cc7a73cf8: The sky frame recorded the repeat: evidence for Yakov and bait for those who buy closed records.
entries.gt_c4b309cdb330f8: After the upper samosbor, rare clean water remained on the roof.
entries.gt_b3d0d3d73cf0d3: Forecast N-40: clear, while the Ministry profits from seeing far.
entries.gt_7f174311ffaaed: Cloud-frame printout: the cloud repeated, but the shadow beneath it shifted.
entries.gt_f99bd98d731a55: Tikhon counts not clouds, but the seconds between identical clouds.
entries.gt_840100b357f596: wind cuts the open slab; ventilation shelter is lower down the passage
entries.gt_3c824b49319cc2: The wind pulls toward the hermodoor: the ventilation shelter will survive the upper samosbor.
entries.gt_e9b85db8a8053a: The wind noise dies down in the ventilation shelter. You can wait out the upper samosbor here.
entries.gt_ea67a22cb42716: The open concrete is behind you, but the roof shelter is not checked.
entries.gt_47317c1ac3ea6c: Machine Hall of Lift Group C-15
entries.gt_c08d75e30e36a2: Power Bypass to the Production Belt
entries.gt_21c35e168f9b7d: After C-15 repairs, the lower personnel corridor accepts door kits and energy cells from the Belt.
entries.gt_67ea05677457d8: Signal Crawlspace to the Dark Transfer
entries.gt_af67698402e000: Powered ventilation gives a short path to the metro switch booth, but calls the Lampovy creatures.
entries.gt_f6fa3cf3d02f75: Emergency Light Reserve for the Late Route
entries.gt_ad72d9936a2bde: The relay diagram can go into a late light pocket instead of local comfort.
entries.gt_0d438144e3584a: The C-15 machine pulls the car honestly, and the route lies. If you change the fuses, at least the lift will stop choosing the lower floor at random.
entries.gt_2ca7d7fa002b35: I am not repairing the whole lift. Only the small right to arrive where you pressed.
entries.gt_e27d7441a9cd47: A service key does not open the world. It opens two doors, and I answer for what is behind them.
entries.gt_955e3bb7137dda: The route holds. Not forever, but long enough to regret the ride.
entries.gt_6a7d64e8f39a08: If the button is silent, listen to the relay. The relay lies more quietly than a person.
entries.gt_a8cb8b313a2ec1: The master key is not in charge here. The person who knows which two doors are in the ledger, and which were invented by residents, is in charge.
entries.gt_62e9be11f39ad3: The storeroom is mine. Take without asking, and the noise will go through the pipes before you.
entries.gt_35c39b283b36a3: Ventilation leads quickly if you are not afraid of what feeds on light.
entries.gt_12c71cf779fdb5: Now you know the small circuit. People are written off for the big circuit.
entries.gt_45a8ce57537f8d: Do not show the clearance in the Ministry. They will ask why it is useful.
entries.gt_b4fb0314c12ad0: Light can be returned to one route. Not all of them: the building will decide we are calling it outside.
entries.gt_ebdbc55d2360e3: The Lampovy eats bright things. That is why I repair darkness carefully.
entries.gt_d4f46f9aedec02: If the switchboard pops during samosbor, doors become opinions.
entries.gt_1782565fa69a6e: One circuit is lit. Let the second feel shame in the dark.
entries.gt_6bdf445960a8c2: Do not stand under the new lamp too long. It smells like you now.
entries.gt_2c577c4e92d6a0: They locked me outside my own log. There is a raid queue in there, and it has almost reached the market.
entries.gt_b2bfd0ef8acb69: Rearrange the bypass form, and the raid will go first into an empty corridor instead of toward people.
entries.gt_906cb5c80fc8b1: This is not rescue. This is moving the error to an address where nobody has signed yet.
entries.gt_b4e48c11bc5840: The log changed the queue. Now it pretends that was its own decision.
entries.gt_0500b1a506f164: If they ask, I was not here. I am still locked out, just from the other side.
entries.gt_e2b1402c2fe75b: Boris: "Three fuses into the C-15 machine hall. We will repair not the whole lift, but the small right to arrive by button."
entries.gt_171012a6d9c478: Nadya: "Go into the C-15 storeroom and check the small-circuit key ledger. The master key here means exactly two doors."
entries.gt_db4af0a0e31423: Roma: "Bring the relay diagram. We will raise light on one route, not set up a canteen for the Lampovy creatures."
entries.gt_72e2f433fd3650: Pavel: "Bypass form to the C-15 dispatch office. The raid queue will be sent into an empty corridor if the stamp passes with the dispatcher."
entries.gt_4dac927feff9b6: Boris's Cabinet by the Lift Machine
entries.gt_05dbb01b15bcdc: C-15 winch pulls toward the east service lift
entries.gt_c6cf211ca50346: The C-15 winch knocks toward the Production Belt. Repairs open a short personnel passage.
entries.gt_94a3c97231d337: East service lift found. After repairs, it will become a bypass to production issue.
entries.gt_a5c24c06e43fbf: The C-15 winch went quiet behind you. The production bypass remains unchecked.
entries.gt_6b9d651742bcfd: dark air leads to the switch booth
entries.gt_76815ecba4335b: Ventilation answers with a metro signal: a shortcut is possible if power is restored to the circuit.
entries.gt_5f8dac734ee8af: The ventilation crawlspace has been found. It promises the Dark Transfer and warns about Lampovy creatures.
entries.gt_50fac8ebabe1cb: The metro signal went into ventilation. The short crawlspace remains dark.
entries.gt_4c30de51461c8f: the switchboard holds a late light reserve
entries.gt_1fce8079b81a50: The switchboard clicks with late reserve: the diagram can be spent here or kept for the lower route.
entries.gt_7e86a81a47cc8b: Relay reserve found. It is a future light pocket, if it is not spent on site.
entries.gt_db25e5ed5699a9: The light reserve stayed in the switchboard. The late route will be darker.
